description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a deep, dark brown leather upholstery that gives it a sleek and sophisticated appearance. The sofa features two large, plush seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear to be generously padded for comfort. The armrests are straight, flat, and at the same height as the backrest, creating a clean-lined, boxy silhouette. The sofa is supported by six slender, black metal legs, which are positioned at the corners and along the center for added stability. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary design. This piece would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A sleek, dark brown leather sofa with straight armrests, plush cushions, and slender black metal legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and back cushions, the straight armrest, and the slim profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the alignment of the six supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all appearing loose and plush, arranged side by side with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, straight black metal legs positioned at the four corners and two central points, exposed and minimalistic in style.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at medium height, with two large, loose back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
